summary: REGRESSION TEST PASSED - Code quality refactoring verified. All 29 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend flow tested: Landing → Problem Selection → Voice Selection → Chat with AI response. The centralized apiClient (lib/apiClient.js) and refactored hooks are working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: apiClient centralization working correctly - all API calls use the new axios instance with auth interceptor
useChat hook refs pattern working - callbacks (refreshUser, onAIMessage) properly use refs to avoid stale closures
Console statements properly guarded with process.env.NODE_ENV checks
TTS greeting cache miss errors are non-critical (graceful fallback)
seed_data_creation: Guest users created during tests for isolation

mocked_apis.webhook_signature: MOCKED - Webhook signature verification may not work end-to-end with test key

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 was a REGRESSION test after major code quality refactoring. All features verified working: (1) AUTH: Guest creation, Register, Login, /me, Logout; (2) CHAT: POST /api/chat returns AI response, chat history persists, sessions list works; (3) PAYMENTS: Test tariff activates, paid tariffs return Stripe URL; (4) BOOKINGS: Slots returned, booking creation works; (5) USER SETTINGS: Voice, problem, language, theme updates; (6) FRONTEND FLOW: Landing → Problem Selection → Voice Selection → Chat with AI response; (7) Tariff page shows 4 cards; (8) Booking calendar loads. The key refactoring changes (centralized apiClient, refs pattern in hooks, extracted chat.py helpers) are all working correctly.

features_tested.3_auth_login: PASS - POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials works

features_tested.17_frontend_chat: PASS - Chat page loads, sends messages, receives AI responses
features_tested.19_frontend_booking: PASS - Booking calendar loads with weekday slots
features_tested.20_console_errors: PASS - No critical console errors (TTS cache miss is non-critical)
